ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Permission level of the role (e.g., 1 for researcher, 2 for data analyst, 3 for administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version (e.g., v1, v2, etc.) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., data source, methodology, etc.) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metadata_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Brest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  " tas_10" REAL /* Temperature value at the 10th percentile */,
  "tas_90" REAL /* Temperature value at the 90th percentile */,
  "tas_50" REAL /* Temperature value at the 50th percentile */,
  "tas_corr" REAL /* Corrected temperature value */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., historical, projected) */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiment_versions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES experiment_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor (e.g., lead researcher, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_contributors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_contributors_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the experiments table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
